languages.text: "Абеляр, растолкуй этим... марионеткам кощунственного действа, с кем они имеют дело".

traits.locale_text: "Абеляр, растолкуй этим... марионеткам кощунственного действа, с кем они имеют дело".

languages.text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."
languages.original_text: "Абеляр, растолкуй этим... марионеткам кощунственного действа, с кем они имеют дело".

traits.locale_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."
"Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."
"Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

languages.text: “阿贝拉德，去提点一下这群……演出渎神闹剧的提线木偶，让他们弄明白，自己究竟在跟谁说话。”
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: “阿贝拉德，去提点一下这群……演出渎神闹剧的提线木偶，让他们弄明白，自己究竟在跟谁说话。”

languages.text: « Abélard, faites savoir aux marionnettes de ce spectacle sacrilège à qui elles s’adressent. »
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: « Abélard, faites savoir aux marionnettes de ce spectacle sacrilège à qui elles s’adressent. »

languages.text: "Abelard, bu saygısız gösterinin... Kuklalarını kime hitap ettikleri konusunda aydınlat."
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: "Abelard, bu saygısız gösterinin... Kuklalarını kime hitap ettikleri konusunda aydınlat."

languages.text: «Abelard, explique a estos... títeres de un espectáculo sacrílego con quién están hablando».
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: «Abelard, explique a estos... títeres de un espectáculo sacrílego con quién están hablando».

languages.text: "Abelard, erklärt den ... Marionetten dieses blashphemischen Spektakels, wer vor ihnen steht."
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: "Abelard, erklärt den ... Marionetten dieses blashphemischen Spektakels, wer vor ihnen steht."

languages.text: アベラール、この不敬な光景の…人形たちに、彼らが誰に話しかけているのかを教えなさい。
languages.original_text: "Abelard, enlighten these... puppets of this sacrilegious spectacle as to whom they are addressing."

traits.locale_text: アベラール、この不敬な光景の…人形たちに、彼らが誰に話しかけているのかを教えなさい。
